raw_consumer_statement: XXXX I spoke with someone at the cfpb and found out the Email on file didn't match my account. I was told to resubmit with my claim number. The priests phone was hacked and I received a text asking to purchase XXXX  gift cards XXXX {$100.00}. The church posted on XXXX it was fraud, a few people received it. I let my credit card company know and they are not helping me.
